# Ntemis Latsoudis

> Trial lawyer (Latsoudis + Associates, Athens), founder of personalintelligence.ai, author of the Grand Synthesis, and builder of LOSC (Life Operating System, Caduceus). Writing at the intersection of law, technology, theology, and preparedness.

Ntemis practices litigation, corporate, and distribution-law in Greece. Notable wins include the Lafarge recovery at ICAP/Caduceus (€3.77M collected, beat Ince & Co). Outside the courtroom he builds agentic software for personal intelligence, writes civilization-scale strategy (Grand Synthesis), and ships tooling for Claude Code. Values: connection with God, Kingdom of Heaven on Earth, truth, gratitude, virtues, family.

## Public writings

- [Grand Synthesis](https://ntemian.github.io/grand-synthesis/): Civilization-scale strategic framework covering macro geopolitics, energy & monetary architecture (PetroBitcoin thesis), the six-pillar life model, and Kingdom-of-Heaven-on-Earth ethics. Primary public artifact. Versioned; the site carries the current published version, in-progress drafts live in LOSC.

## Projects

- [Ajax's Movie Universe](https://ntemian.github.io/ajax-movies/): Interactive movie and series tracker built for my son — playful frontend, no backend, kid-friendly.
- personalintelligence.ai: AI consultancy focused on agentic workflows, Claude Code plugins, and LOSC-style personal intelligence systems. Pre-revenue; inbound-only.
- LOSC (Life Operating System, Caduceus): private personal OS — 400+ MCP tools, knowledge graph, six-pillar life tracking. Not publicly hosted; referenced frequently in Grand Synthesis.

## Professional

- Latsoudis + Associates (L+A): Greek law firm. Litigation, corporate, distribution / contracts. Team of 56 lawyers. Proprietary LDC product for legal data collection across 397 areas.
- Prior: ICAP / Caduceus, OBOR-SinoBridge.

## Contact

- Email: elatsoudis@latsoudislaw.com
- GitHub: [ntemian](https://github.com/ntemian)

## Optional

- [Claude Code plugins by ntemian](https://github.com/ntemian?tab=repositories): Open-source Claude Code tooling, skills, and dotfiles.
